conditions.description: Consumer-owned trusted-base claim admission control is not part of this preservation-only change.
Branch rules, CODEOWNERS, immutable action references, dependency locks, and remaining least-privilege changes require a separately scoped change.
The July 11 canonical state and later corpus-freeze state require a linked current-state projection rather than historical rewriting.
An independent reviewer has not yet recomputed this preservation package from the published branch.
The participant-registry package remains a salvage candidate and is not admitted by this change.
Cross-System Claim Handoff v0.1 baseline execution remains not started.
